about.title: About & Privacy
about.privacyContent: All computations are performed locally in your browser. We do not collect, store, or transmit any data you enter. Your input never leaves your device.
about.feature1: Pure frontend implementation, no backend required
about.feature2: All computations done locally, data stays in browser
about.feature3: Dark mode and multiple themes supported

base64.name: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
base64.description: Base64 encode/decode for text and files, standard/URL-safe mode
base64.dropFile: Drop file here or click to select

url.name: URL Encoder/Decoder
url.description: URL encode/decode, URL parsing and batch processing
url.batchTip: One per line for batch processing

htmlEntity.name: HTML Entity Encoder/Decoder
htmlEntity.description: HTML entity escape/unescape with sandbox preview

unicode.name: Unicode Converter
unicode.description: Text to Unicode code points, Emoji code point lookup

json.name: JSON Tools
json.description: JSON format, compress, validate, sort and convert
json.escapeUnicodeDesc: Escape non-ASCII chars like Chinese to \uXXXX

jwt.name: JWT Parser
jwt.description: JWT token parser, Header/Payload decode and expiry display
jwt.algNoneWarning: Security Warning: alg=none means unsigned, security risk!

timestamp.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.description: Unix timestamp to datetime conversion, multi-timezone, batch processing, relative time
timestamp.inputTip: Supports: Unix seconds (10 digits) / milliseconds (13 digits) / ISO8601 / local datetime string

cron.name: Cron Expression
cron.description: Cron expression parser with human-readable description, next execution times, templates
cron.fiveField: 5 fields: min hour day month weekday
cron.sixField: 6 fields: sec min hour day month weekday

uuid.name: UUID / ULID Generator
uuid.description: Batch generate UUID v4 and ULID, with validation and case options
uuid.ulidInfoDesc: 26 chars, timestamp + random, sortable by time (lexicographic sort)
uuid.ulidFormat: Format: TTTTTTTTTT RR (10 char ms timestamp + 16 char random, Crockford Base32)
uuid.uuidInfoDesc: Cryptographically secure random, guaranteed unique. Format: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx

randomString.name: Random String
randomString.description: Generate random strings with custom length and charset, password strength checker
randomString.atLeastOneType: Please select at least one character type
